fields.name: Emotional
fields.description: Emotional states that affect control and performance.

fields.name: Irritated
fields.player_description: A flash of irritation crosses your mind. Something has gotten under your skin.
fields.observer_description: seems slightly annoyed, their patience wearing thin.

fields.name: Upset
fields.player_description: Your temper is rising. It's becoming harder to think clearly through the frustration.
fields.observer_description: is visibly upset, their composure slipping.

fields.name: Angry
fields.player_description: Rage burns in your chest. Your hands tremble with barely contained fury.
fields.observer_description: radiates anger, their face flushed and jaw clenched.

fields.name: Enraged
fields.player_description: White-hot rage consumes you. Every thought is drowned in fury, every instinct screaming for violence.
fields.observer_description: is consumed by rage, their entire body trembling with barely-contained fury.

fields.name: Berserk
fields.description: Complete loss of control, devastating intensity.
fields.player_description: You have lost all control. There is only the red haze of absolute fury.
fields.observer_description: has completely lost control, a terrifying vision of unbridled rage.

fields.name: Flustered
fields.player_description: Heat rises to your cheeks. A small slip, but it nags at your confidence.
fields.observer_description: appears slightly flustered, a hint of color in their cheeks.

fields.name: Embarrassed
fields.player_description: You wish the ground would swallow you. Every eye seems to be judging your failure.
fields.observer_description: is clearly embarrassed, avoiding eye contact and shifting uncomfortably.

fields.name: Humiliated
fields.player_description: The sting of humiliation burns deep. You've been exposed, diminished, made small.
fields.observer_description: has been thoroughly humiliated, their posture slumped and spirit visibly wounded.

fields.name: Shamed
fields.player_description: Crushing shame weighs on your every action. You are unworthy, broken, exposed to all.
fields.observer_description: carries themselves with visible shame, as if bearing an invisible weight.

fields.name: Disgraced
fields.description: Complete loss of dignity, devastating penalties.
fields.player_description: You have lost everything - honor, dignity, self-worth. The disgrace is absolute and consuming.
fields.observer_description: has been utterly disgraced, a broken shadow of their former self.
